ast.source: TODO (will be created)
ast.target: 待办事项（将被创建）

ast.name: setButtonText

ast.target: 浏览文件夹

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Cancel
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where daily TODO notes are stored.
ast.target: 存储每日待办笔记的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional suffix after the date (e.g. "TODO" produces "2025-06-09 TODO.md"). A space is added automatically. Leave blank for "YYYY-MM-DD.md".
ast.target: 日期后的可选后缀（例如，\"TODO\" 会生成 \"2025-06-09 TODO.md\"）。系统会自动添加一个空格。留空则为 \"YYYY-MM-DD.md\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag added to the frontmatter of new daily TODO notes.
ast.target: 添加到新每日待办笔记前置信息中的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a '# TODO' heading below the frontmatter in new notes.
ast.target: 在新笔记的前置信息下方添加一个 '# TODO' 标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick an existing folder in your vault for daily TODO notes.
ast.target: 在您的保险库中选择一个现有文件夹用于存放每日待办笔记。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: TODO folder
ast.target: 待办文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File name suffix
ast.target: 文件名后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: TODO tag
ast.target: 待办标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include heading
ast.target: 包含标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Browse folders
ast.target: 浏览文件夹

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Set up Daily TODO
ast.target: 设置每日待办

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No folders found in your vault. Try creating _TODO instead.
ast.target: 在您的保险库中未找到文件夹。请尝试创建 _TODO 文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Setup saved, but creating today's TODO failed. Check the developer console for details.
ast.target: 设置已保存，但创建今日待办失败。请检查开发者控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create today's TODO. Check the developer console for details.
ast.target: 创建今日待办失败。请检查开发者控制台获取详情。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create today's TODO from previous day
ast.target: 从前一天创建今日待办

ast.name: text
ast.source: Before creating today's list, choose where your daily TODO notes should live.
ast.target: 在创建今日列表之前，请选择您的每日待办笔记存放位置。
